📚 Daily Learning & ADRs

A personal knowledge base tracking insights, architecture decisions, and continuous learning journey.

💡 Recent Learning

2026-06-10

Understanding SOLID Principles Impact

Architecture

Realized how Dependency Inversion Principle reduces testing time from 2-3 hours to 15-20 minutes per feature through proper mocking.

#SOLID #Testing #Architecture
2026-06-09

Go Channels: Buffered vs Unbuffered

Go

Unbuffered for synchronization, buffered for decoupling. Prevented deadlock in worker pool by setting correct buffer size.

#Go #Concurrency #Channels
2026-06-08

DAG Execution Optimization

Data Engineering

Parallelizing independent DAG nodes reduced pipeline execution time by 60%. Topological sort is critical for order.

#DAG #Parallelism #Data
2026-06-07

Stateless Service Design

Scalability

Moving session storage from memory to Redis enabled horizontal scaling. Now we can add servers without concerns.

#Scalability #Redis #Architecture

🏛️ Architecture Decision Records (ADRs)

ADR-001

Use Event-Driven Architecture for Analytics Pipeline

Accepted

Decision

We will use Kafka-based event streaming instead of batch jobs for analytics

Rationale

Real-time insights, easier to scale, decoupled services

Consequences

More operational complexity, need event schema management

Date: 2026-06-10
ADR-002

Implement Cache-Aside Pattern for User Data

Accepted

Decision

Cache-aside (lazy loading) instead of write-through caching

Rationale

Better for read-heavy workloads, simpler to implement

Consequences

Possible stale data, need careful invalidation

Date: 2026-06-08
ADR-003

Database Sharding Strategy

Pending

Decision

Shard by user_id to distribute write load

Rationale

Supports 10x growth without infrastructure changes

Consequences

Cross-shard queries become complex, operational overhead

Date: 2026-06-05

📖 How to Use This Section

💡 Daily Learning

Track insights and lessons learned from projects, reading, and experimentation. Keep entries concise and actionable.

  • ✓ Major "aha" moments
  • ✓ Performance improvements discovered
  • ✓ Problem patterns and solutions
  • ✓ Technologies or patterns mastered

🏛️ ADRs

Architecture Decision Records document significant technical decisions with rationale and consequences.

  • ✓ Why you chose Technology X
  • ✓ Trade-offs considered
  • ✓ Future impact assessment
  • ✓ When/if to revisit
